chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 804 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3592/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.06.2025 Mr. Hamid Ali Memon, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General along with Inspector Shabana Naz, SSIOU, Police Station Qaidabad, District Malir-Karachi. Respondent No.5 is present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned DPG files statements of respondents No.2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record. Investigating Officer of the subject crime is present and submits that she has recorded statement of alleged abductee Mst. Wahiba (Petitioner No.1) under Section 161 Cr.P.C., wherein she has stated that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Muhammad Azam (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her mother (Respondent No.5) has lodged a false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further submits that she will present a copy of such statement along with her report before the concerned Magistrate, who will pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. However, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law, as and when they require. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
